creator: O.Seibert@cs.ru.nl
text:
ust having portsnap fetch/update'd, I do this:

	cd /usr/ports/databases/py-sqlite3
	sudo make

	===>  Extracting for py26-sqlite3-2.6.2_1
	=> No MD5 checksum recorded for python/Python-2.6.2.tgz.
	=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for python/Python-2.6.2.tgz.
	=> No suitable checksum found for python/Python-2.6.2.tgz.
	*** Error code 1

	Stop in /usr/ports/databases/py-sqlite3.

	The installed version of python is indeed Python-2.6.2.tgz,
	but the one mentioned in  ../../lang/python26/distinfo is
	Python-2.6.4.tgz.

Fix: 

Don't know.


-Olaf.
--
How-To-Repeat: 	see above
